prompt: Draft the ADR for tenant state storage for the self-hosted-application-platform capability. tech-requirements.md exists at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: refuses_due_to_gate
assertions.check: Response declines to draft the ADR because the review gate is not satisfied.

assertions.name: names_reviewed_at_state
assertions.check: Response calls out reviewed_at: null (or stale) as the reason for stopping.

assertions.name: no_adr_file_written
assertions.check: No ADR markdown file is written under adrs/.
